name: 12oz Glass Mug - Threshold™: Clear Borosilicate Glass, Traditional Style, Autumn Decor, Single Piece Drinkware
description: From iced tea to a cup of hot coffee, this 12-Ounce Glass Mug from Threshold™ will help you recharge yourself for the day. Made with clear glass, this mug brings a simple style update to your mug collection that's perfect to kickstart your day or refresh yourself in evening. Ideal for both hot and cold beverages, this mug is dishwasher safe on delicate cycle; hand-washing recommended — just add a white plate with your favorite cookies or any other snack to complete your meal setup.
